title: Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
summary: MiniMax M3 is an open-weights AI model designed for coding agents, tool use, and long-context tasks. It supports up to one million token context windows and is compatible with both Anthropic and OpenAI APIs. MiniMax Code provides an IDE and multi-agent collaboration features for development workflows.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, an open-weights model built for coding agents, tool use, and long-context tasks, alongside MiniMax Code, which adds an IDE and multi-agent collaboration features for development workflows. M3 supports context windows up to one million tokens and is compatible with both the Anthropic and OpenAI APIs, positioning it as a substitute in setups already using Claude or Codex. The framing treats it as an alternative to those tools, with the open weights and API compatibility as the main differentiators.
